LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Army_Cap.description: A simple red cap bearing the g老旧en star emblem of the People's Republic of China. This practical headwear is standard issue for s老旧iers and low-ranking military personnel of the People's Liberation Army. The bright red fabric and prominent star design display allegiance to the state while providing basic protection from sun and light rain.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Army_Cap.label: 中国军帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Naval_Cap.description: A naval service cap worn by submariners and sailors of the People's Liberation Army Navy. This water-resistant cap features the red star emblem and provides protection against ocean spray and harsh weather conditions.深海军蓝色搭配红色点缀，一眼就能认出属于中国海军。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Naval_Cap.label: 中国海军帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Officer_Cap.description: A peaked service cap bearing the g老旧en star emblem of the People's Republic of China. This formal headwear is worn by officers and high-ranking officials of the Chinese military. The rigid design and prominent insignia command respect and denote authority, making it a symbol of leadership within the ranks.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Officer_Cap.label: 中国军官帽
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Helmet.descripti: 融合中国隐形技术的先进战术头盔。这款时尚头盔配有加固面罩、内置循环呼吸器和传感器阵列。气密密封设计可防止环境危害，并在与兼容装甲一起佩戴时可与隐形野战系统连接。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Helmet.label: 中国隐形头盔
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Ushanka.description: A fur-lined winter cap featuring the iconic red star of the People's Republic of China. This warm ushanka is standard issue for Chinese military personnel operating in c老旧 climates. The ear flaps provide excellent protection against frostbite, while the red exterior proudly displays allegiance to the state.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Ushanka.label: 中国乌尚卡
